steps.title: Spot the example relationship
steps.content: The passage opens with a general principle about sleek vehicles and then immediately introduces the T-45 Goshawk jet as a concrete example to prove that principle. The transition word should signal this movement from general to specific.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”for instance,” marks the T-45 as a specific example of what was just stated — a sleek vehicle that is aerodynamic. Meanwhile signals time (wrong), however signals contrast (wrong), and additionally signals addition (wrong). That matches choice C — C is correct.
